_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of YAP/TAZ-driven TEAD activity prevents growth of NF2-null schwannoma and meningioma.

_contextSnippet: As for human schwannoma cells, use of an ALDH1A1-specific inhibitor slowed the proliferation of BenMen-1 meningioma cells
details: ALDH1A1-specific inhibitor reduced proliferation of BenMen-1 meningioma cells
